PROP-baseauction-inv-030.text: Price computation must use 18-decimal fixed-point arithmetic consistently across all paths.
PROP-baseauction-inv-030.assertion: all price values scaled to 1e18 before arithmetic; no mixed-decimal operations

locations.note: All price arithmetic uses 1e18 scaling; mulDivUp uses asset decimals (10**assetInParams.decimals) at line 799
Price normalization to 18 decimals happens here before returning to _getAssetOutAmount
